zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Rheineck於大約1115年出生在瑞士聖 加倫海內可時，她的父親Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck39歲，母親Gertrud von Northeim26歲。她於1135年與Dirk VI van Holland結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1176年9月26日在斯洛伐克特倫其音潔盧札萊姆享年62歲，埋葬在以色列。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rheineck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of the places in Germany and Switzerland called Reineck or Rheineck, for example one in Bavaria and another near Rorschach, Switzerland.

variants.name: Reinecke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Ernst, Fritz, Gunther, Hans, Manfred, Otto, Wilhelm.
North German: from a pet form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with ragin ‘counsel’ as the first element. See also Reincke .

variants.name: Reinecker
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called Reineck or Rheineck (see   Reineck  ).

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Rheineck was born about 1115, in Rheineck, Sankt Gallen, Switzerland, her father, Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck, was 39 and her mother, Gertrud von Northeim, was 26. She married Dirk VI van Holland in 1135. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 September 1176, in Jeruzalém, Trenčín, Slovakia, at the age of 62, and was buried in Israel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Rheineck est née environ 1115, à Rheineck, St-Gall, Suisse, son père, Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Gertrud von Northeim, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Dirk VI van Holland en 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 septembre 1176, à Jeruzalém, Trenčín, Slovaquie, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Israël.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Rheineck um 1115 in Rheineck, St. Gallen, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck 39 und ihre Mutter Gertrud von Northeim 26. Sie hat 1135 Dirk VI van Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. September 1176 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Jeruzalém, Trenčín, Slowakei und wurde in Israel begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Rheineck è nata il circa 1115 nel Rheineck, San Gallo, Svizzera, sua padre, Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Gertrud von Northeim, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Dirk VI van Holland nel 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 settembre 1176, nel Jeruzalém, Trenčín, Slovacchia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Israele.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie von Rheineckが約1115年にスイススト. ガレンルヘアイネックで生まれた時，父Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineckは39歳，母Gertrud von Northeimは26歳であった。1135年にDirk VI van Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1176年9月26日にスロバキアトレンciンジャーウザルeムで62歳で死去し，イスラエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Rheineck(이)가 대략 1115년 스위스 스트. 갈렌 리이네c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud von Northeim(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1135년 Dirk VI van Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1176년 9월 26일 슬로바키아 트렌ci 제루자e에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 이스라엘에 묻혔다.

pt.Haarlem, Noord-Holland, Nederland: Haarlem, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Rheineck nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Rheineck, St. Gallen, Suiça, seu pai, Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud von Northeim, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Dirk VI van Holland em 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1176, em Jeruzalém, Trenčín, Eslováquia, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Israel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Rheineck родилась около 1115 г. в местности рааинекк, ст. галлен, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud von Northeim, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dirk VI van Holland в 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 сентября 1176 г. в местности джирузалeм, тренciн, Словакия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности Израиль.

sm.1150-1176: mai le 1150 e o'o I le 1176

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie von Rheineck nació aproximadamente 1115, en Rheineck, St. Gallen, Suiza, su papá, Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Gertrud von Northeim, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Dirk VI van Holland en 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1176, en Jeruzalém, Trenčín, Eslovaquia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Israel.
